steps.title: This protocol automates Media Exchange and...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates Media Exchange and is part of a five protocol suite. The five protocols are: Protocol 1: [Seeding Plates with Mammalian Cells](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/00a214-protocol-1) Protocol 2: [DAPI Staining](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/00a214-protocol-2) Protocol 3: [Fix and DAPI Stain](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/00a214-protocol-3) Protocol 4: [Media Exchange](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/00a214-protocol-4) Protocol 5: [Primary Staining](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/00a214-protocol-5) The protocol begins with an empty reservoir for liquid waste, a 12-channel reservoir that contains what will be added to the plates, tips, eppendorf plate(s), and the P300-Multi attached to the left mount. Using up to 4 plates, the protocol will iterate through each plate, adding reagents to the plate and removing liquid. The following steps are performed to each plate: Remove 120µL of media Add 140µL of differentiation media If necessary (can select 'yes' or 'no' under **Second Exchange**) Remove 140µL of differentiation media Add 140µL of differentiation media If you have any questions about this protocol, please email our Applications Engineering team at [protocols@opentrons.com](mailto:protocols@opentrons.com). --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [Opentrons OT-2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-robot/products/ot-2) * [Opentrons OT-2 Run App (Version 3.19.0 or later)](https://opentrons.com/ot-app/) * [Opentrons p300 Multi-Channel Pipette, GEN2](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/8-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips) * [NEST 12
